The presence of a dedicated security guard and CCTV cameras adds an extra layer of safety to the premises. Additionally one lift makes it convenient to access different floors within the building making this flat a comfortable and secure living choice.Locality This property enjoys a prime location with a range of conveniences nearby. Public transport options are readily available simplifying your daily commute.Banks and ATMs are in close proximity ensuring your financial transactions are hasslefree. resultList.dtldesc: Located in the rapidly developing residential corridor of Thanisandra in Bangalore, this 2 BHK apartment offers a modern living experience within a well-planned township. Situated in Sobha Dream Gardens, the property is ideal for homebuyers seeking a contemporary home with strong connectivity and access to urban conveniences.Property SpecificationsThis ready-to-move apartment spans a super built-up area of 1005 sq. ft and is positioned on the 5th floor of a 23-storey tower, offering pleasant views of greenery and open surroundings. The layout comprises two well-designed bedrooms, two bathrooms, and three balconies, ensuring ample natural light and ventilation throughout the home. The apartment is unfurnished, providing complete flexibility for interior customisation. A separate kitchen space is available with provision for fittings, allowing for convenient setup based on personal preferences. The unit is east-facing, enhancing brightness and creating a positive indoor ambience.FacilitiesThe project is equipped with a wide range of modern amenities designed to support a comfortable lifestyle. Schools and hospitals are located within approximately 500 metres to 1 km, while a bus stop is conveniently situated just outside the building. With growing infrastructure, connectivity, and availability of modern residential projects, Thanisandra continues to attract both end-users and investors looking for long-term value.

Its readytomove status and unfurnished condition provide flexibility for buyers to tailor the interiors according to personal preferences and lifestyle requirements.Property SpecificationsThis resale apartment is part of the Nidhi Apartment building and offers a substantial super builtup area of 1,675 sq. ft. Situated on the first floor of a fivestorey structure, the home enjoys ease of access and a welcoming entrance sequence. The layout comprises two spacious bedrooms and two wellappointed bathrooms, thoughtfully arranged around a combined living and dining area that supports both daily living and social interaction. The apartments generous proportions allow for flexible interior planning and efficient circulation between spaces. Being unfurnished, the unit provides a blank canvas for buyers to incorporate their preferred finishes and furnishings, giving freedom to create a home that is uniquely their own. The practical design supports natural light across principal rooms and contributes to a comfortable indoor environment.FacilitiesFundamental utilities such as water and electricity are in place, ensuring that the home is ready for occupation upon transfer of ownership. The buildings maintenance and upkeep reflect the established nature of the community and support reliable daytoday functioning. The ground floor positioning combined with the first floor height offers a balance of accessibility and privacy, making it suitable for families and individuals alike. The unfurnished condition allows buyers to plan an efficient kitchen layout, personalised storage solutions and bespoke interior details according to their lifestyle preferences.LocalityFrazer Town is a wellregarded and mature residential area of Bangalore, known for its central location, treelined streets and a blend of historical charm with modern urban convenience. The property benefits from excellent connectivity to major commercial districts, educational institutions, healthcare facilities and recreational spots. Daily conveniences such as supermarkets, banks, pharmacies and dining outlets are available within easy reach, supporting a comfortable and practical lifestyle. The area is also wellserved by public transport options, enabling smooth commuting to surrounding business hubs and residential neighbourhoods. Its reputation as a calm yet wellconnected enclave makes Frazer Town an attractive choice for discerning homebuyers looking for stability, convenience and enduring neighbourhood appeal.
